title: Canaccord Just Nearly Doubled Hut 8 Price Target to $130 on AI Data Center Pivot
text: Canaccord analyst price target increase. Canaccord raised price target on Hut 8 to $130 from $70, keeping Buy rating. Reflects company's accelerating pivot from Bitcoin mining to AI data center infrastructure. Nearly doubled target represents strong confidence in AI data center strategy. Follows Beacon Point announcement and River Bend financing. Analyst views Hut 8 positioned as major player in AI infrastructure space.
